# allelectoralresults.info

A live election results tracker covering Indian state assembly elections.

## Current Elections

### Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly Election 2026 (TNLA 2026)
- Date: May 4, 2026
- Constituencies: 234
- Majority: 118 seats
- Result: TVK (Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam) won with 107 seats
- Runner-up: DMK (Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam) with 60 seats
- Third: AIADMK (All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam) with 47 seats
- Key alliances: TVK (Solo) 107, SPA Alliance (DMK-led) 74, ADMK+ Alliance 53
- Notable: Thalapathy Vijay's TVK won a landslide in their debut election

### Kerala Legislative Assembly Election 2026 (KLA 2026)
- Date: May 4, 2026
- Constituencies: 140
- Majority: 71 seats
- Result: UDF (United Democratic Front, INC-led) won with 93 seats
- Key parties: INC 63, IUML 22, KC 7
- Runner-up: LDF (Left Democratic Front, CPI(M)-led) with 38 seats
- Third: NDA (BJP-led) with 3 seats

## Pages

- /tnla2026 — Tamil Nadu dashboard with party tally and majority tracker
- /tnla2026/results — All 234 TN constituency results with search and filters
- /tnla2026/constituency/[1-234] — Individual TN constituency results
- /tnla2026/star-candidates — Key politicians and their results
- /kerala2026 — Kerala dashboard
- /kerala2026/results — All 140 Kerala constituency results
- /kerala2026/constituency/[1-140] — Individual Kerala constituency results

## Data Source

All data sourced from the Election Commission of India (results.eci.gov.in).
Results are final as of May 5, 2026.
